description_long: This is a metallic train locomotive with a rectangular, boxy body and a flat roof, positioned on a set of standard gauge railway tracks. The front features a cab with windows and a red lower section, while the sides are mostly silver-gray with some dark and orange detailing near the ends. The train sits on black wheels and is flanked by long, dark railway tracks extending on both sides. The surface appears to be made of metal, with visible panel lines and a slightly matte finish. There are no visible doors or windows along the sides, and the train appears to be a single locomotive unit without attached carriages.
description: A silver-gray locomotive with a red front, black wheels, and long railway tracks, featuring a boxy metallic body and minimal side detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red cab section, windows, and the narrow width of the locomotive.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the locomotive, silver-gray body, and extended railway tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view with a dark end section and the continuation of the tracks, showing the back of the locomotive.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with visible side details and the length of the tracks.
attribute_window_arrangement: windows only at the cab ends
